applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: ttnn.leaky_relu(input_tensor, negative_slope={NEGATIVE_SLOPE}, memory_config={MEMORY_CONFIG}); constraints: {'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT supported (works directly on TILE-layout activations; conv outputs must be moved to TILE via ttnn.to_layout before applying)', 'dtype': 'bfloat16 exact within 1 ULP; bfloat8_b validated at pcc>=0.999', 'notes': 'negative_slope is a scalar attribute, not a tensor; default 0.01 matches torch default. Supports in-place-style preallocated output_tensor and explicit queue_id.'}; fusion_notes: Unary eltwise activation; candidate for fusion into preceding matmul/conv as fused activation or into eltwise chains. In HiFi-GAN-style residual blocks it appears as leaky_relu -> (to_layout/reshape) -> conv1d chains; the activation itself is the torch.nn.functional.leaky_relu node in the source graph.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, C, T] TILE-layout vocoder upsample-stage activation (T = audio frame count, grows per upsample stage)
placement_observations.source: call_site: HiFi-GAN upsample stage 'h_bct_tile = ttnn.leaky_relu(h_bct_tile, self.leaky_relu_slope, memory_config=mc_dram)'

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, C_last, T_final] TILE-layout pre-conv_post activation (largest T, post all upsamples)
placement_observations.source: call_site: final activation 'ttnn.leaky_relu(h_bct_tile, 0.01, memory_config=mc_dram)' (HF quirk: fixed slope 0.01, not leaky_relu_slope)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, T, C] TILE-layout MRF residual-block activation (applied before convs1[i] and after convs1[i], residual captured before first leaky_relu)
placement_observations.source: call_site: residual block 'y_tile = ttnn.leaky_relu(residual_t, self.leaky_relu_slope, memory_config=mc_dram)' and 'y_tile = ttnn.leaky_relu(h_conv, self.leaky_relu_slope, memory_config=mc_dram)'
